label: Scatter things
description: Scatters individual ThingDef instances across the map with optional quality, filth, and cluster settings.

thingDef.label: Thing def
thingDef.description: ThingDef to scatter across the map.

stuff.label: Stuff
stuff.description: ThingDef used as the material override when spawning the thing.

clearSpaceSize.label: Clear space size
clearSpaceSize.description: Number of cells to clear in an irregular lump around each placement before spawning.

clusterSize.label: Cluster size
clusterSize.description: Number of instances to place in a cluster before moving to the next scatter cell.

quality.label: Quality
quality.description: Quality category forced on spawned items. Absent means quality defaults to Normal.

minify.label: Minify
minify.description: When true, the thing is minified into an uninstalled form before being placed.

avoidUsedRects.label: Avoid used rects
avoidUsedRects.description: When true, placement cells that overlap any used rect are rejected.

createUsedRect.label: Create used rect
createUsedRect.description: When true, the occupied rect of each spawned thing is registered as a used rect.

skipRoofed.label: Skip roofed
skipRoofed.description: When true, placement cells that are roofed are rejected.

filthDef.label: Filth def
filthDef.description: ThingDef of filth spawned around each placed thing.

filthExpandBy.label: Filth expand by
filthExpandBy.description: Number of cells to expand the occupied rect outward when spawning filth.

filthChance.label: Filth chance
filthChance.description: Probability (0-1) that each eligible cell gets a filth spawn.

terrainValidationRadius.label: Terrain validation radius
terrainValidationRadius.description: Radius in cells around the placement cell in which terrain tags are checked.

terrainValidationDisallowed.label: Terrain validation disallowed
terrainValidationDisallowed.description: Terrain tags that must not be present in the terrain validation radius.

terrainValidationAllowed.label: Terrain validation allowed
terrainValidationAllowed.description: Terrain tags that must all be present in the terrain validation radius.
